title: Nzvimbo yepaIndaneti yeIATF
summary: Nzvimbo yepachena yeInternational Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yaida musha wevoruzhinji wakagadzikana unotsanangura muenzaniso wacho, unonyora mapurojekiti, uye unonongedzera vanobetsera padanho rinotevera rakakodzera.
why: Nzvimbo iyi ndiyo musuo wepamberi weIATF. Yakavakwa sepurojekiti diki isingachinji kuitira kuti igare iri nyore kuverenga, kushandura, uye kuchengetedza munzvimbo yakavhurika.
scopeIn: Public registry of accepted, active, and archived IATF projects with status, maintainer, repository, and demo
Chinyorwa chechiRungu chine chimiro chakagadzirira kushandurwa
Static deployment pamusoro Cloudflare Vashandi Static Assets
scopeOut: Nzvimbo dzemitezo dzakavanzika, maakaundi, kana kuyerera kwekupinda
Kubata kodhi yepurojekiti, iyo inogara mudura rega rega reprojekiti
Nyaya yekutevera yemapurojekiti ega ega, ayo anogara mune yega purojekiti GitHub repository

title: IATF selfie
summary: Muenzaniso wepakuvamba weIATF, wakachengetwa pashure pokunge wasvika pakumira kwomuzvarirwo.
problem: Kuongorora kwekutanga kwechishandiso chakanangana nekuwanika pasi pemuraira weIATF.
why: Repository inochengetwa pachena sechinyorwa chebasa racho, kunyange zvazvo kuvandudzwa kwebasa kwakamira.
scopeIn: Muenzaniso wekutanga wechishandiso chakanangana nekuwanika chinochengetwa sechinyorwa cheveruzhinji

title: IATF bot
summary: IATF nharaunda bot, yakachengetedzwa mushure mekusvika pakumira kwechisikigo.
why: Repository inochengetwa pachena sechinyorwa chebasa racho, kunyange zvazvo kuvandudzwa kwebasa kwakamira.
scopeIn: Discord automation around IATF community channels, yakachengetwa sechinyorwa cheveruzhinji
